title: Board Discussion Button
excerpt: The addition of the board discussion feature is awesome, however, it would be better if there was a button “Board Discussion”, similar to the “add new item” button in the primary interface. Currently it is hidden away in…

posts.author: PSCDustin (Dustin Jamieson)
posts.cookedHtml: The addition of the board discussion feature is awesome, however, it would be better if there was a button “Board Discussion”, similar to the “add new item” button in the primary interface. Currently it is hidden away in the board options.
